source: CodeChef course items that do not have a normal accepted Python baseline workflow

exemptions.CANDY1C: Dynamic Programming course concept/MCQ page; CodeChef problem API exposes no coding languages and normal Python source submissions return result_code 14 without a submission id.
exemptions.CNTWAYC: Dynamic Programming course concept/MCQ page; CodeChef problem API exposes no coding languages and normal Python source submissions return result_code 14 without a submission id.
exemptions.MATDEF: Matrix course reading page; CodeChef IDE language API advertises no Python submission language.
exemptions.MATMCQ1: Matrix multiple-choice course checkpoint; Python submissions are rejected as normal code answers.
exemptions.MATTYPES: Matrix course reading page; CodeChef IDE language API advertises no Python submission language.
